meta_title: For Founders: Claude Code skills setup to Solve tutorial hell (Intermediate Case Study)
meta_description: Learn how to Claude Code skills setup and overcome tutorial hell. A Intermediate-level Case Study using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: Claude Code skills setup to Solve tutorial hell
content.seo_description: Learn how to Claude Code skills setup and overcome tutorial hell. A Intermediate-level Case Study using Antigravity and Claude Code to accelerate your MVP.
content.answer_block: Tutorial hell ends when you stop consuming and start shipping. By integrating Claude Code with Antigravity, you transform documentation into an active development partner. This setup automates boilerplate, enforces architectural standards, and allows you to build production-ready features directly from your business logic, bypassing the endless cycle of passive learning.
content.intro:
The screen glows with a dozen open browser tabs, a graveyard of half-finished tutorials and 'best practice' guides that never survive the transition to a real codebase. You are a Founder, not a student; every hour spent in tutorial hell is an hour your product isn't generating revenue. The gap between knowing how to code and actually shipping a SaaS MVP is a chasm that swallows most ideas whole.

But the paradigm has shifted. By leveraging Claude Code as an autonomous agent and Antigravity to manage your technical context, you can force your IDE to do the heavy lifting. This isn't about watching a video; it's about building a high-velocity feedback loop where your intent is translated into production-grade code instantly.

steps.title: Initialize the Semantic Context
steps.description: Establish a clear project boundary so the AI understands your business domain before writing a single line of code.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the business requirements in /docs/product_spec.md and generate a folder structure that prioritizes modularity and future scalability.

steps.title: Automate Boilerplate Generation
steps.description: Stop manually configuring frameworks. Use Antigravity to scaffold the core architecture based on your specific tech stack.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Scaffold a Next.js 14 app with Tailwind, Prisma, and Auth.js. Ensure a clean separation between server actions and UI components.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run "scaffold the base project structure defined in Antigravity"

steps.title: Enforce Schema Integrity
steps.description: Maintain database consistency by letting the AI generate migration files directly from your business logic.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate Prisma schema definitions for a multi-tenant SaaS application based on the user-role hierarchy defined in the requirements.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run "generate prisma migrations and update schema.prisma"

steps.title: Implement Critical Path Logic
steps.description: Focus on the 'money-making' features. Instruct Claude Code to build the core authentication and subscription flow.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create the backend service layer for Stripe subscription management, including webhook validation and user tier updates.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run "implement stripe webhook handler in app/api/webhooks/route.ts"

steps.title: Continuous Refactoring Loop
steps.description: Use the AI to review your own hand-written code against the architectural standards set in the initial prompt.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Review the current codebase for technical debt, specifically in the state management layer, and suggest refactors for better performance.

pro_tips: Always use a 'system_context.md' file in your root; Claude Code treats this as the source of truth for your coding style and business constraints.
Bypass generic prompts by forcing the AI to reference your specific project files in the Antigravity context.
Use Claude Code's --diff flag to manually review changes; never accept AI-generated code blindly, even when it's perfect.
Treat your CLI history as a log of your product development; it's a goldmine for future debugging and onboarding new developers.
Keep your context window clean by periodically clearing the Antigravity cache when shifting between major feature modules.
content.next_steps: After completing your MVP structure, perform a security audit using Claude Code's review tools, then deploy your first staging build to Vercel or Railway to validate your market assumptions.
content.conversion_block: Stop building for the sake of learning and start building for the sake of shipping. You have the tools, the architecture, and the agentic workflow to outpace your competition. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
